Chat-First Shell

Approved source pack

Static runtime · bounded answers

The assistant is the app.

Ask from approved sources. Render the right view. Keep working. This shell can inspect the source map, open the dashboard, show receipts, or explain what it should refuse.

Ask. Render. Inspect. Return.

Ask about the docs. Open the source map. Render the checklist. If the answer is not in the approved material, the shell should say that instead of improvising.
